positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of interconnected celestial bodies and cosmic elements. The main subject is a magnificent, bioluminescent aurora borealis arching over a minimalist mountain silhouette. Incorporate nebulae swirls in deep indigo, violet, and electric teal. Shooting stars streak across the sky like ribbons of gold dust. Include detailed astral maps, constellations forming elegant geometric patterns, and ethereal wisps of stardust. The overall composition should be highly graphic, maintaining clean, bold color blocks and strong contrast suitable for a high-end apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic minimalism. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast luminescence from the aurora, giving the scene a glow effect. Composition: Centered, circular, and highly balanced.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, text, logo, watermark, copyright, amateur drawing, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, messy edges
